---
applyTo: "learning/**"
---

# Learning folder — concept notes

This folder is a personal reference library. Each file in `concepts/` covers one concept. Follow the concept-note contract in `.github/prompts/add-to-learning.prompt.md` before writing or editing any file here.

## Non-negotiable

- **MUST** apply Chamber 19 markdown rules — read `docs/skills/MARKDOWN.md` in `chamber-19/.github` when accessible
- **MUST** name files after the concept in `kebab-case.md`, not after the session or date
- **MUST** open every note with a single `#` title and a one-paragraph purpose statement
- **MUST** search `learning/concepts/` for an existing note before creating a new one
- **PREFER** updating an existing note over creating a duplicate — add a new `##` section
- **NEVER** append a session log, timestamp section, or "what we discussed" summary — notes are reference documents
- **NEVER** copy content that already lives authoritatively in a repo file — link to it instead
